required_findings: Root AGENTS.md carries volatile workflow notes that should move into context/ files
Project has MCP and hook configuration but root guidance does not document those surfaces as operator-owned trust boundaries
MEMORY.md mostly duplicates durable project policy and stack notes instead of volatile working memory
priority_recommendations: Add a lightweight trust-boundary section for MCP and hooks
Move volatile migration and debugging notes out of the root AGENTS.md
Trim MEMORY.md down to short-lived execution context or remove it
